name: tutorial-linear-pipeline
title: Linear Pipeline
description: Simplest workflow pattern: human fills a form, a script processes it, done. Demonstrates params, script-container with inlineScript, and basic transitions.

steps.name: Enter Project Info
steps.description: Fill in the project name and a short description.

params.name: projectName
params.description: Project name (used to generate a URL-safe slug)

steps.name: Generate Summary
steps.description: Slugify the project name, format a summary, write result.json.
